title: Babes in Bagdad
writer: Joe Ansen, Felix E. Feist, Reuben Levy
actors: Paulette Goddard, Gypsy Rose Lee, Richard Ney
plot: Hassan, the Kadi of Bagdad, has a harem housing twelve beauties, but concentrates his attention on Zohara. A newcomer, Kyra, introduces rebellion into the by the unheard of act of complaining to the Caliph about the lot of the wom...
